meta.title: Heart Rate Zone Calculator — Find Your Training Zones
meta.description: Calculate your five heart rate training zones. Standard and Karvonen methods for optimized fat burn, endurance, and peak performance.

heartRate.title: Heart Rate Zone Calculator
heartRate.description: Find your five training heart rate zones.
heartRate.recoveryDesc: Light activity, active recovery. Improves overall health and aids recovery.
heartRate.fatBurnDesc: Easy endurance training. Builds aerobic base and burns fat efficiently.
heartRate.aerobicDesc: Moderate effort. Improves cardiovascular fitness and endurance.
heartRate.anaerobicDesc: Hard effort. Increases speed, power, and lactate threshold.
heartRate.vo2maxDesc: Maximum effort. Develops peak performance and speed.

idealWeight.bmiRangeText: Based on a BMI of 18.5 – 24.9, your healthy weight range is

meta.title: Sleep Cycle Calculator — Optimal Bedtime & Wake Time
meta.description: Find your optimal bedtime or wake time based on 90-minute sleep cycles. Wake up refreshed, not groggy.

sleep.title: Sleep Cycle Calculator
sleep.description: Find your optimal bedtime or wake time based on sleep cycles.
sleep.howItWorksText: A full sleep cycle lasts ~90 minutes. Waking between cycles helps you feel refreshed. This calculator factors in ~15 minutes to fall asleep and recommends times aligned with complete cycles.

meta.title: TDEE Calculator — Free Daily Calorie Needs Calculator
meta.description: Calculate your Total Daily Energy Expenditure. Science-backed Mifflin-St Jeor formula, personalized to your activity level.

tdee.title: TDEE Calculator
tdee.description: Calculate your Total Daily Energy Expenditure based on the Mifflin-St Jeor equation.

meta.title: Pregnancy Due Date Calculator — Free Naegele's Rule Calculator
meta.description: Calculate your pregnancy due date using Naegele's rule. Gestational age, trimester, conception date, progress bar, and milestone timeline. Free, instant, no sign-up.

pregnancy.title: Pregnancy Due Date Calculator
pregnancy.description: Estimate your due date, gestational age, and pregnancy milestones.
pregnancy.howItWorksText: This calculator uses Naegele's rule: add 280 days to the first day of your last menstrual period (LMP). If your cycle is longer or shorter than 28 days, the due date is adjusted accordingly. Gestational age counts from LMP, not from conception.

meta.title: Blood Pressure Calculator — Check Your Values | Health Calculators
meta.description: Enter your blood pressure values and instantly find out your category: Normal, Elevated, Stage 1, Stage 2 or Crisis. Free and no sign-up.

bloodPressure.title: Blood Pressure Calculator
bloodPressure.description: Enter your blood pressure values and instantly find out your category.
bloodPressure.recNormal: Your blood pressure values are optimal. Maintain your healthy lifestyle: balanced diet, regular exercise, and sufficient sleep.
bloodPressure.recElevated: Your values are slightly elevated. Reduce salt intake, exercise regularly, and monitor your blood pressure regularly.
bloodPressure.recStage1: Talk to your doctor about lifestyle changes and possible treatment. Regular monitoring is important.
bloodPressure.recStage2: See your doctor soon. Stage 2 hypertension usually requires medication.
bloodPressure.recCrisis: Call emergency services (911) immediately. Hypertensive crises require immediate medical treatment.

meta.title: Calorie Deficit Calculator — Calculate Daily Calorie Goal
meta.description: Calculate your daily calorie goal for weight loss. Mifflin-St Jeor formula, individual deficit, and safety warnings.

calorieDeficit.title: Calorie Deficit Calculator
calorieDeficit.description: Calculate your daily calorie goal for weight loss — based on the Mifflin-St Jeor formula.
calorieDeficit.warningUnsafe: Your calorie goal is below 1,200 kcal/day. This is a health concern — please consult a doctor.
calorieDeficit.warningAggressive: You are planning to lose more than 1 kg per week. A slower pace is more sustainable and healthier.

meta.title: Ovulation Calculator — Calculate Your Fertile Days | Health Calculators
meta.description: Calculate your ovulation and fertile window. Enter your cycle length, get your ovulation date, fertile window and next cycle predictions. Free, instant, no sign-up.

ovulation.title: Ovulation Calculator
ovulation.description: Calculate your ovulation date and fertile window based on your cycle length.
ovulation.howItWorksText: This calculator uses the calendar method: ovulation occurs approximately 14 days before your next period. For a 28-day cycle, that is day 14; for a 32-day cycle, day 18. The fertile window spans 5 days before ovulation, ovulation day, and 1 day after.

meta.title: Protein Calculator — Daily Protein Intake Calculator
meta.description: Calculate your daily protein intake based on weight, activity level, goal, and diet type. Personalized recommendations with food sources.

protein.title: Protein Calculator
protein.description: Calculate your daily protein target based on your weight, activity, goal, and diet.

meta.title: BMR Calculator — Free Basal Metabolic Rate Calculator
meta.description: Calculate your Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) with Mifflin-St Jeor or Harris-Benedict formula. Activity level estimates, instant results.

bmr.title: BMR Calculator
bmr.description: Calculate your Basal Metabolic Rate — the calories your body burns at rest.
bmr.activityEstimates: Estimated daily burn by activity level

meta.title: Calories Burned Calculator — Calculate Calories by Activity
meta.description: Calculate calories burned for 30+ activities. MET-based formula, food equivalents and weekly projection. Free, instant, no sign-up.

caloriesBurned.title: Calories Burned Calculator
caloriesBurned.description: Calculate how many calories you burn during different activities — based on MET values.

meta.title: Intermittent Fasting Calculator — Eating & Fasting Windows
meta.description: Calculate your eating and fasting windows for 16:8, 18:6, 20:4 or OMAD. Free, instant, no sign-up.

intermittentFasting.title: Intermittent Fasting Calculator
intermittentFasting.description: Calculate your eating and fasting windows based on your protocol and schedule.
intermittentFasting.tip168: Most popular protocol. Skip breakfast, eat between 12:00 PM and 8:00 PM. Ideal for beginners.
intermittentFasting.tip186: Slightly stricter. Eating window e.g. 1:00 PM–7:00 PM. Good for intermediates who want more fasting time.
intermittentFasting.tip204: Only 4 hours of eating, e.g. 3:00 PM–7:00 PM. Requires experience and filling meals.
intermittentFasting.tipOmad: One meal per day. Maximum fasting time, requires a nutrient-dense, high-calorie meal.
intermittentFasting.howItWorksText: With intermittent fasting, you alternate between eating and fasting windows. This calculator computes your personal time window based on the chosen protocol and your last or first meal time. During the fasting phase, only water, tea, and black coffee are allowed.

meta.title: One Rep Max (1RM) Calculator — Estimate Your Max Lift
meta.description: Calculate your one-rep max using Epley, Brzycki, Lombardi and O'Conner formulas. Free, instant, no sign-up.

oneRepMax.title: One Rep Max (1RM) Calculator
oneRepMax.description: Estimate your one-rep max from any lift using four science-backed formulas.
oneRepMax.howItWorksText: The one-rep max (1RM) is the maximum weight you can lift for a single repetition. These formulas estimate your 1RM from a submaximal lift — safer than actually attempting a true max. The Epley formula is the most widely used: 1RM = weight × (1 + reps/30).

meta.title: Waist-to-Hip Ratio Calculator — WHO Risk Assessment
meta.description: Calculate your waist-to-hip ratio and assess health risk based on WHO guidelines. Free, instant results for men and women.

waistHipRatio.title: Waist-to-Hip Ratio Calculator
waistHipRatio.description: Assess your health risk based on WHO waist-to-hip ratio guidelines.
waistHipRatio.recLow: Your WHR indicates a {start}low health risk{end}. Keep up your healthy lifestyle with regular exercise and a balanced diet.
waistHipRatio.recModerate: Your WHR indicates a {start}moderate health risk{end}. Consider increasing physical activity and monitoring your waist circumference.
waistHipRatio.recHigh: Your WHR indicates a {start}high health risk{end} according to WHO guidelines. Central obesity is associated with increased cardiovascular and metabolic risk. Consult a healthcare professional.

meta.title: VO2 Max Calculator — Calculate Maximum Oxygen Uptake
meta.description: Calculate your VO2 Max with the Cooper Test, Rockport Walk Test or direct entry. Fitness category, age comparison and percentiles. Free, instant, no sign-up.

vo2Max.title: VO2 Max Calculator
vo2Max.description: Calculate your maximum oxygen uptake and find out how fit you really are.
vo2Max.cooperInfo: Run for 12 minutes as far as you can and enter the distance in meters.
vo2Max.rockportInfo: Walk 1 mile (1,609 m) as fast as you can and measure your heart rate at the end.
vo2Max.directInfo: Enter your known VO2 Max value directly.

meta.title: Running Pace Calculator — Pace, Finish Time & Splits
meta.description: Calculate your running pace for 5K, 10K, half marathon, and marathon. Pace in min/km and min/mi, finish time, negative split plan, and km/mile splits. Free, instant, no sign-up.

runningPace.title: Running Pace Calculator
runningPace.description: Calculate your running pace, finish time, and splits for any distance.
runningPace.negativeSplitDesc: Run the first half 2.5% slower and the second half 2.5% faster than your average pace.

meta.title: Keto Calculator — Macros for the Ketogenic Diet
meta.description: Calculate your keto macros: fat, protein and net carbs. Based on your TDEE, goal and body stats. Free, instant, no sign-up.

keto.title: Keto Calculator
keto.description: Calculate your personalized keto macros based on your calorie needs and goals.
